name: Tina Turner
abstract: Tina Turner (born Anna Mae Bullock; November 26, 1939 – May 24, 2023) was a singer, songwriter, actress and author. Dubbed the "Queen of Rock 'n' Roll", she broke both racial and gender barriers in rock music with her vocal prowess and stage presence.

works.t: A Love Like Yours (Don't Come Knocking Everyday)

I Want to Take You Higher

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Magnusson
about_quotes.evidence: And they were playing Bobby Blue Bland and Ike and Tina Turner and James Brown music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Magnusson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Shaffer
about_quotes.evidence: Garret Morris... what if he’s in drag as Tina Turner and he sings “Proud Mary”
about_quotes.doc_title: Paul Shaffer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 24, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: John Levy
about_quotes.evidence: They didn’t know anything about Tina Turner. They didn’t know anything about any of the other artists.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Levy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Louie Bellson
about_quotes.evidence: We had Tina Turner on, Ethel Waters, Erroll Garner, everybody.
about_quotes.doc_title: Louie Bellson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
